introduction.title: Internal Research Document
paragraphs: The Laboratory was never designed to become another memecoin website.
Every update becomes part of its history.

timeline.title: Protocol Timeline
timeline.description: Phases are observations, not promises. Research determines what survives.

phases.title: ORIGIN SIGNAL
phases.subtitle: The first public signal becomes an organism.
phases.description: The experiment began when a Base-native signal escaped the feed and started attracting Hosts.
phases.notes: The origin phase is archived as evidence, not mythology.

phases.title: FOUNDATION
phases.subtitle: The Laboratory becomes usable.
phases.description: Core systems are brought online so visitors can interact with the experiment instead of only reading about it.
phases.notes: Foundation remains active while the operating system stabilizes.

phases.title: SIGNAL DETECTION
phases.subtitle: The Laboratory begins observing the ecosystem.
phases.description: The next research layer studies public ecosystem signals before they become obvious.
phases.notes: Objective: detect meaningful ecosystem signals without creating artificial urgency.

phases.title: HOST OBSERVATION
phases.subtitle: The Laboratory begins studying its Hosts.
phases.description: Host behavior becomes part of the research surface through local memory, sessions, and hidden discoveries.
phases.notes: The Laboratory starts remembering everyone who enters, only when the mechanism is useful.

phases.title: RESEARCH EXPANSION
phases.subtitle: The Laboratory expands beyond observation.
phases.description: Research output becomes easier to inspect, archive, and extend.
phases.notes: Expansion happens only after existing systems prove useful.

phases.title: AUTONOMOUS RESEARCH
phases.subtitle: The Laboratory gains its first researcher.
phases.description: When sustainable, the Laboratory may gain an assistant capable of preserving context and suggesting experiments.
phases.notes: Only when the Laboratory is ready.

phases.title: ECOSYSTEM
phases.subtitle: The Laboratory becomes infrastructure.
phases.description: If the experiment survives long enough, research may turn into tools for Hosts, builders, and adjacent ecosystems.
